title: Heath Slater Shares Thoughts On Possible WWE Return
summary: Former WWE star Heath Slater has shared whether or not he'd return to the company if asked following his 2020 departure.
imageAlt: Heath Slater Shares Thoughts On Possible WWE Return
aiSummary: Former WWE star Heath Slater has shared whether or not he'd return to the company if asked following his 2020 departure.

fullArticle:
Heath Slater was a successful mid-card act in WWE for years, initially as a member of The Nexus and later 3MB, as well as The Social Outcasts and his pairing with Rhyno. However, Slater was eventually released from the promotion in April 2020. In recent years, some surprising talent have made their way back to WWE, and during an appearance on David Otunga's YouTube channel, Slater weighed in on whether he'd be open to a return after a fan wrote in during the livestream to ask if he'd ever "finish his story" as well.

"That's a good question, and that's another question I get – 100% – and, I'm gonna give you the answer I give to everyone else: they got my damn number, my email. All they have to do is call me and hit my damn music, 'cause I'm ready for it!" he expressed. "I'll go and do it, ...
